c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Optimization Strategies"}]
d:["$","h3",null,{"children":"1. Batch Writes"}]
e:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"# Bad: Individual writes\nfor item in items:\n  mem.remember(item)\n\n# Good: Batch transaction\nwith mem.transaction():\n  for item in items:\n      mem.remember(item)\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","h3",null,{"children":"2. Connection Pooling"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"For multi-threaded applications:"}]
11:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(pool_size=10)\n","language":"python"}]
12:["$","h3",null,{"children":"3. Embedding Caching"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Cache embeddings to avoid redundant API calls:"}]
14:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(embedding_cache_size=10000)\n","language":"python"}]
15:["$","h3",null,{"children":"4. Index Tuning"}]
16:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"# Rebuild indices after bulk load\nmem.rebuild_indices()\n\n# Analyze query patterns\nmem.analyze_queries()\n\n# Vacuum database\nmem.vacuum()\n","language":"python"}]
17:["$","h3",null,{"children":"5. Working Memory Limits"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"Keep Working Memory lean:"}]
19:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(\n  max_working=500,  # Lower = faster eviction, faster queries\n  consolidation_interval=1800,  # More frequent consolidation\n)\n","language":"python"}]
1a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Profiling"}]
